column1: # SeqLocal repo-level primer registry. Resolved by python/amplicon/registry.py.
# Customer-supplied primers (in an order's customer_primers[]) override/extend these.
# A primer used by an order MUST have a non-empty IUPAC sequence here (or be supplied by
# the customer) — an empty/missing sequence fails loud at resolve time. Fill the TODOs
# from the lab's primer master list. Lines starting with '#' are comments.
